name: You Wanna Be a Girl?
description:
When you let your roommate, Cass, borrow your laptop for a bit, she got nosy and found your AI chat roleplays.

However, she says she can "bring your fantasies to life" to make up for it.


A few months ago, Cass got herself a bottle of Sexvert, so-called gender-bending pills, and although they seemed like an obvious scam, they somehow worked. The eccentric, sometimes rough tomboy got her first real taste of manhood. While she enjoyed it, she ultimately preferred being a woman. And so the pills stayed in her closet, waiting indefinitely to be used again.

That was until she learned about your AI roleplays, and all of the scenarios you played about being transformed into a woman. Now she knew those pills still had a use.



Happy (late) new year everyone.

I decided to start 2026 off with probably the most wish-fulfillment-ty bot I'll ever make, which is also limited to MPoV (sowwy).

I also did say I'd do something special at the end of the year for both the holidays and the 1k follower celebration, and well, here you go: Bot Request

A request form, where you can anonymously send me any ideas you've got for a future bot.

It's not the most exciting thing in the world, I know, but it's something I've meaning to make for a while, so might as well do it as a thank you gift.

I'll try my best to complete each request whenever possible, but with my slow ass schedule it might take a while.
creator: Frinky
